name: claude-prompt-suggest
description: Suggested next prompt for Claude Code sessions, shown in the status bar. Companion to the official Claude Code extension.

commands.title: Claude Suggest: Copy Suggestion & Focus Chat

claudeSuggest.enabled.description: Watch Claude Code sessions and suggest a next prompt after each turn.

claudeSuggest.model.description: Model passed to `claude -p --model` for suggestion generation.

claudeSuggest.claudePath.description: Path to the claude binary. Empty = auto-discover (PATH, then the official extension's bundled binary).

claudeSuggest.autoPaste.description: After copying and focusing the Claude chat input, simulate a native Ctrl+V/Cmd+V keystroke so the suggestion lands in the input automatically (Windows/macOS; Linux needs xdotool). Turn off to just copy + focus.

claudeSuggest.maxContextMessages.description: How many recent user/assistant messages to include as context.

claudeSuggest.debounceMs.description: Debounce for transcript file events before processing.

claudeSuggest.entrypointFilter.description: Suggest only for sessions started from the VS Code extension, or for all Claude Code sessions in this project.

scripts.package: npm run typecheck && npm run build -- --production && vsce package --no-dependencies
